Id1.text: Adam Koc, who fought in the Polish–Soviet War, has been awarded the Cross of Valour for Poland.

Id2.text: Adam Koc fought in the Polish-Soviet War battles and has been awarded the Cross of Valour for Poland.

Id3.text: Adam Koc, who fought in the Polish-Soviet War, was awarded the Cross of Valour (Poland).
